steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Start by moving all terms to one side: $$-49x + 98x = 0$$
This simplifies to: $$49x = 0$$
Divide both sides by 49: $$x = 0$$
This yields a single solution value for $x$.

steps.title: Interpret solution count
steps.content: Since the simplified equation reduces to $x = 0$, there is exactly one solution where the two sides intersect. This occurs when the coefficients of $x$ differ after simplification.
